title: Will China Continue To Build Stock
section_path: Will China Continue To Build Stock
section_path_text: Will China Continue To Build Stock
summary:
Main
China recorded another month of strong crude stock builds in May, even as seaborne imports softened. This trend raises a key question for markets: what are the latest figures telling us about China's underlying demand? By Emma Li
China's seaborne crude imports fell 8% month-on-month and 3% year-on-year in May, dipping below the 10mbd mark.
